Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 28th, 2005 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: March 7th, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 on appeal for sexual content including dialogue, and for language.
Running Time: 105 minutes
Plot point: Divorcée Romance, Dysfunctional Family, Romance
Social setting: Therapists / Therapy
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Stratus Film Company, Focus Features, Team Todd, Younger Than You Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
